user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Hudson's Bay Flagship Store
fields.description: Iconic Canadian department store for high-quality souvenirs, including the famous multi-stripe blankets and Roots apparel.

insertion_point.reasoning: The user wants to shop in the morning before the CN Tower visit. Position 1 places this activity after the 8:15 AM breakfast and before the 12:30 PM lunch at the CN Tower.
